response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior software developer, far exceeding the junior/mid-level requirement. Their background in full-stack development and various technologies is impressive, but their seniority and current role at Google may not align with the entry-level nature of the position.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and other relevant technologies
Experience with various programming languages and frameworks
concerns: Significantly more experienced than the required junior/mid-level position
Currently holds a senior position at Google, may not be looking for a junior role
May have salary expectations that are too high for the role
